welcome.titleLine2: Let's get your first client on board.
welcome.description: You earn 15% of monthly subscriptions + 3% of gross rental for every client you manage. Portfolio bonuses start at 10 properties. The system handles operations — you focus on relationships.
welcome.step1Desc: Invite a property owner from your network. The system sends them a signup link and service agreement.
welcome.step2Desc: Owner uploads property info, photos, selects house rules, and signs the service agreement.
welcome.step3Desc: Track earnings, commissions, and portfolio bonuses in real time. Operations are handled by HM Crew.
welcome.helpProfileDesc: Check your territory, shares, and contract details
welcome.helpContactDesc: Questions about process, territory, or commission

clientsPage.title: My Clients
clientsPage.emptyBody: Invite your first client to start managing their property.

inviteClient.title: Invite a client
inviteClient.subtitle: Send a signup link. The new owner will be added to your portfolio automatically.
inviteClient.warningBody: Make sure you've talked to the owner and they expect this email. Cold invites have poor conversion.
inviteClient.sentBodySuffix: with a signup link. The client will be assigned to you automatically.

referralPage.title: My Referral Link
referralPage.subtitle: Share this link with property owners in your territory. New clients registering through it will be automatically assigned to you.
referralPage.codeHint: Only letters, numbers, and hyphens (3-40 chars). Must be unique.
referralPage.statsClientsHint: Property owners registered through your link or assigned to you
referralPage.statsLeadsHint: Open opportunities you can still convert into clients
referralPage.howStep1: Share your personal link with property owners — in conversations, emails, WhatsApp, or social media.
referralPage.howStep2After: , we automatically tag them as yours.
referralPage.howStep3: If they register and become a client, they're assigned to your portfolio automatically.
referralPage.howStep4: You start earning 15% of their subscription and 3% of their gross rental, month after month.
referralPage.pitchIntro: Copy this message and personalise it before sending:
referralPage.pitchBody:
Hi [Name],

I know you own a property on the Costa Tropical and might be interested in how to get better returns without the headaches.

I work with HostMasters, a platform that handles everything — listing, guest comms, cleaning, maintenance, fiscal compliance (Modelo 179, IRNR, NRU registration). Transparent fees, real data dashboard, and AI-driven pricing.

Check it out here: {url}

Happy to walk you through it whenever suits you.

Best,
[Your name]

aiMonitor.title: AI Monitor
aiMonitor.subtitle: Automatic database consistency checks — no Claude API connection yet, detection logic only
aiMonitor.noAlerts: No saved alerts. Alerts will be persisted when the AI Monitor cron is activated.

checks_RESERVATION_PAST_CHECKIN.label: Past check-in with UPCOMING status
checks_RESERVATION_PAST_CHECKIN.desc: Reservations with UPCOMING status whose check-in has already happened — status is outdated and affects the operations dashboard.
checks_RESERVATION_PAST_CHECKIN.fix: Manually mark as ACTIVE or COMPLETED based on the actual reservation state.

checks_CHECKIN_NO_TASK.label: Check-in in <7 days without task
checks_CHECKIN_NO_TASK.desc: Reservations with check-in in the next 7 days without a CHECK_IN task created for the team.
checks_CHECKIN_NO_TASK.fix: Create a CHECK_IN task in the calendar and assign to Crew.

checks_CHECKOUT_NO_TASK.label: Check-out in <7 days without task
checks_CHECKOUT_NO_TASK.desc: Reservations with check-out in the next 7 days without a CHECK_OUT or CLEANING task created.
checks_CHECKOUT_NO_TASK.fix: Create a CHECK_OUT or CLEANING task in the calendar and assign to Crew.

checks_CHECKOUT_NO_CREW_REPORT.label: Check-out without Crew report
checks_CHECKOUT_NO_CREW_REPORT.desc: Reservations completed in the last 3 days without a checkout report submitted by Crew.
checks_CHECKOUT_NO_CREW_REPORT.fix: Ask the Crew member to submit the reservation report.

checks_RESERVATION_ZERO_AMOUNT.label: Reservation with value 0
checks_RESERVATION_ZERO_AMOUNT.desc: Active reservations with value 0 — possible data entry error.
checks_RESERVATION_ZERO_AMOUNT.fix: Check and correct the reservation value.

checks_PAYOUT_NO_INVOICE.label: Paid payout without invoice
checks_PAYOUT_NO_INVOICE.desc: Each payout marked as PAID should automatically generate an invoice for the owner. A mismatch indicates a creation failure.
checks_PAYOUT_NO_INVOICE.fix: Check server error logs. Create the invoice manually if needed.

checks_PAYOUT_OVERDUE.label: Overdue scheduled payout
checks_PAYOUT_OVERDUE.desc: Payouts with scheduledFor date already past without being marked as paid.
checks_PAYOUT_OVERDUE.fix: Process the payment and mark the payout as PAID, or reschedule if not yet processed.

checks_COMMISSION_MISMATCH.label: Outdated commission rate
checks_COMMISSION_MISMATCH.desc: Scheduled payouts with a rate different from the owner's current plan (plan may have changed after the payout was created).
checks_COMMISSION_MISMATCH.fix: Edit the payout and recreate with the correct rate before marking as paid.

checks_INVOICE_PAID_NO_PAIDAT.label: PAID invoice without payment date
checks_INVOICE_PAID_NO_PAIDAT.desc: Invoices with status=PAID but without paidAt are invisible in the revenue dashboard.
checks_INVOICE_PAID_NO_PAIDAT.fix: Edit the invoice and set the payment date manually.

checks_REPORT_MISSING.label: Property with activity but no monthly report
checks_REPORT_MISSING.desc: Properties with reservations last month without a monthly report generated for the owner.
checks_REPORT_MISSING.fix: Generate the monthly report in My Reports.

checks_REPORT_NOT_SENT.label: Report generated but not sent
checks_REPORT_NOT_SENT.desc: Monthly reports from the previous month generated but not sent to the owner.
checks_REPORT_NOT_SENT.fix: Go to My Reports and send the pending reports.

checks_PROPERTY_STALE.label: Property without activity (90 days)
checks_PROPERTY_STALE.desc: Active properties without any reservation in the last 90 days — may be inactive or with an outdated listing.
checks_PROPERTY_STALE.fix: Check with the owner if the property is available for rental.

score.incentiveTitle: Higher score = more tasks for you
score.incentiveDesc: Good work on a property builds trust. The platform prioritises you for future tasks at properties where you performed well.

profile.responsibilitiesDesc: You are the operational backbone of HostMasters — handling check-ins, check-outs, cleaning, maintenance and inspections. Your work report after each visit is sent directly to the property owner.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Introduce yourself. What's your speciality? Years of experience?
profile.howScoreWorks: How your score works for you
profile.scoreTip1: Good work on a property = trust score goes up — you get priority for future tasks there
profile.scoreTip2: Higher global score = access to premium properties with better rates
profile.scoreTip3: Level up = rate bonus — Verified +5%, Expert +10%, Elite +15%
profile.scoreTip4: Owners can mark you as favourite — you always get called first

calendar.title: My Tasks
calendar.subtitle: Tasks assigned to me this week

levelGuide.title: How Levels Work
levelGuide.eliteBenefits: Independent inspections, top priority, premium properties
levelGuide.keyMessage: Higher levels = higher pay per task. An Elite crew member earns 15% more than Basic on every task.
levelGuide.quarterlyDecayDesc: Every quarter, scores decay to the minimum of your current level + 20%% of the excess. Consistently high performance is rewarded — coasting is not.
levelGuide.monthlyDecayDesc: On the 1st of every month, your score resets to the minimum of your current level plus 30% of any excess. This ensures consistent performance is required to maintain your level — accumulated buffer is reduced monthly.

welcome.title: Welkom bij HostMasters
welcome.desc: Laat ons u alles tonen wat uw eigenaarsportaal kan doen. Deze snelle tour laat u alle beschikbare tools zien om uw vastgoed overal ter wereld te beheren.

dashboard.title: Uw Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Uw startscherm toont alles in één oogopslag: de inkomsten van deze maand, bezettingsgraad, uw volgende gast en de staat van uw vastgoed. Realtime bijgewerkt.

earnings.title: Inkomsten & Uitbetalingen
earnings.desc: Volg elke euro. Bekijk uw bruto-inkomen, onze commissie, schoonmaakkosten, onderhoudskosten en uw netto uitbetaling. Alles gespecificeerd, niets verborgen.

bookings.title: Boekingen & Kalender
bookings.desc: Bekijk elke reservering op Airbnb, Booking.com en directe boekingen. Weet wie er komt, wanneer en hoeveel elk verblijf oplevert. Blokkeer data voor persoonlijk gebruik.

care.title: Zorg & Onderhoud
care.desc: Uw vastgoed wordt na elke checkout geïnspecteerd. Volg schoonmaakbeurten, preventief onderhoud en eventuele problemen — allemaal met fotos en rapporten.

communication.title: Directe Communicatie
communication.desc: Stuur berichten naar uw vastgoedbeheerder direct via het platform. Geen verloren e-mails, geen gemiste telefoontjes. Alles gedocumenteerd en doorzoekbaar.

ai.title: AI-aangedreven Tools
ai.desc: HostMasters gebruikt kunstmatige intelligentie om uw inkomsten te maximaliseren. Dynamische prijzen passen uw nachttarief aan op basis van 7 marktfactoren.

reports.title: Rapporten & Documenten
reports.desc: Download gedetailleerde maandoverzichten als PDF in uw voorkeurstaal. Jaaroverzichten, belastingrapporten en volledige transparantie.

plan.title: Uw Plan
plan.desc: U kunt uw abonnement op elk moment bekijken en upgraden. Hogere plannen bieden lagere commissies, AI-prijzen en prioritaire ondersteuning.
features: Upgrade wanneer u wilt, geen binding

done.title: U bent helemaal klaar!
done.desc: Uw portaal is gereed. Verken uw dashboard, bekijk uw inkomsten en neem op elk moment contact op met uw manager. Welkom bij HostMasters.

sidebar.title: Uw Navigatie
sidebar.desc: Deze zijbalk geeft u snel toegang tot alle secties: dashboard, inkomsten, boekingen, onderhoud, plan en directe communicatie met uw manager.

guest.title: Uw Volgende Gast
guest.desc: Zie wie er als volgende aankomt — met nationaliteitsvlag, data en verblijfsduur. Altijd op de hoogte.

condition.title: Staat van het Vastgoed
condition.desc: Na elke checkout wordt uw vastgoed geïnspecteerd. Bekijk de huidige status hier — groen betekent alles in orde.

actions.title: Snelacties
actions.desc: Blokkeer data voor persoonlijk gebruik, vraag een onderhoudsbezoek aan of bekijk uw volledige financieel rapport — alles met één klik.

profile.title: Let's set up your profile
profile.desc: Just a few details so we can personalize your experience.

demo.title: Everything you need, in one place
demo.subtitle: A complete management platform designed for international property owners. See what awaits you inside.

dashboard.title: Your property at a glance
dashboard.desc: Real-time earnings, occupancy rates, next guest information, and property condition — all in one premium dashboard. No more calling your manager for updates.
features: Quick actions: block dates, request visit, view reports

bookings.title: Full booking visibility
bookings.desc: See every reservation across all platforms — Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct. Block dates for personal use. Never be surprised by a booking again.

finance.title: Transparent finances to the cent
finance.desc: Monthly statements with itemized breakdowns. See exactly what you earned, what was charged, and what's coming. Download PDF reports in your language.

care.title: Your property, always cared for
care.desc: Track every cleaning, inspection, and maintenance visit. See reports with photos. Know the condition of your property at all times, from anywhere.

communication.title: Direct line to your team
communication.desc: Message your manager directly through the platform. No lost emails, no phone tag. Everything documented, everything transparent.

mock.aiAssistant: AI Assistant available 24/7 for instant answers

aiTools.title: 5 intelligente tools die voor u werken
aiTools.subtitle: HostMasters is niet zomaar een beheerbedrijf — het is een technologieplatform. Onze AI-tools werken 24/7 om uw inkomsten te maximaliseren.

tools.name: AI Dynamische Prijzen
tools.desc: Algoritme dat 7 factoren analyseert — seizoen, evenementen, concurrentie, vraag, boekingstermijn, beoordelingen en bezetting — om de optimale prijs voor elke nacht te bepalen.

tools.name: AI Team Assistent
tools.desc: Intelligente chatassistent beschikbaar in elk portaal. Vraag naar uw inkomsten, volgende boekingen of vastgoedstatus — krijg direct antwoord op basis van uw echte gegevens.

tools.name: AI Monitor
tools.desc: Autonoom systeem dat dagelijks 9 controles uitvoert op elke reservering, uitbetaling en taak. Detecteert anomalieën voordat ze problemen worden.

tools.name: Marktintelligentie
tools.desc: Wekelijkse data-analyse van Airbnb en Booking.com in de regio Costa Tropical. Echte concurrentiegegevens: prijzen, beoordelingen, bezetting.

tools.name: Prijsanalyse voor Eigenaren
tools.desc: De prijsprestaties van uw vastgoed in de tijd. Seizoentrends, gemiddelde tarieven, bezettingspatronen. Vergelijk uw prijzen met de markt.

hero.subtitle: You bought on the Costa Tropical to invest — not to worry about cleanings, difficult guests or misaligned prices. HostMasters handles everything with real data, AI pricing and total transparency.

problem.title: Being a remote owner shouldn't be this hard

items.title: Random pricing
items.desc: Without market data, pricing is guesswork. You lose revenue in peaks and can't attract in low seasons.

items.title: Zero visibility
items.desc: You don't know what's happening at your property until you get a complaint or a surprise bill.

items.title: Slow communication
items.desc: Lost emails, photos that never arrive, reports that only come when you insist.

items.title: Opaque commissions
items.desc: You don't know how much is left for you. Hidden costs eat your profitability without warning.

solution.title: Management with intelligence, not guesswork
solution.subtitle: Three pillars that make HostMasters different from any traditional property manager.

items.title: AI Dynamic Pricing
items.desc: Algorithm that analyzes seasonality, local events, competition and real-time demand to set the optimal price for each night.
items.highlight: Up to +25% revenue vs. fixed pricing

items.title: Your own data, not estimates
items.desc: Dashboard with real data from your bookings, revenue and costs. Detailed monthly reports to the cent — no surprises.

items.title: Market Intelligence
items.desc: Access to Costa Tropical market data: occupancy rates by zone, average prices, demand trends and benchmarks.

social.title: A platform built for the future

items.quote: The short-term rental market on the Costa Tropical is growing fast, but most management is still done manually. A platform that combines AI pricing with real data has enormous potential to professionalize the sector.
items.name: Industry Analysis

items.quote: Property owners investing in southern Spain need transparency and technology. The gap between what traditional managers offer and what technology enables is exactly where innovation happens.
items.name: Market Outlook

items.quote: The combination of dynamic pricing algorithms, real-time market data and transparent owner portals represents the next generation of property management — one that benefits both owners and guests.
items.name: Technology Perspective

plans.title: Choose the level of service you need
plans.subtitle: All plans include full management. The more you invest, the lower the commission and the more intelligent tools you get.

journey.title: From sign-up to full income — in 5 steps
journey.subtitle: A clear, guided process. You never walk alone.
journey.step1Title: Sign up and wait for your Manager
journey.step1Desc: Create your account. A local Manager fluent in your language will reach out to welcome you personally.
journey.step2Title: Choose the right plan for you
journey.step2Desc: Your Manager explains each plan in detail and recommends the one that fits your property and goals.
journey.step3Desc: Review and sign your contract digitally. Transparent terms, no hidden fees, cancel anytime.
journey.step4Desc: We connect your Airbnb and Booking.com calendars, install Smart Lock, and configure everything.
journey.feat11: AI Dynamic Pricing — optimal rate every night
journey.feat12: AI Monitor — 9 daily automated checks on your property
journey.feat13: AI Assistant — instant answers with your real data

finalCta.subtitle: Start with the Premium plan for 1 month at no cost. See the difference that real data and AI pricing make to your revenue.
finalCta.disclaimer: No commitment · No credit card · Cancel anytime

contact.title: Let's talk about your property
contact.subtitle: Whether you're exploring options or ready to start, our team is here to help you make the most of your Costa Tropical investment.
contact.whyDesc: Get a personalised assessment of your property's rental potential, understand our management plans, or simply ask a question. No pressure, no obligation.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your property or ask us anything...
contact.thankYouDesc: We have received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours. In the meantime, feel free to explore our plans.
contact.required: Please fill in your name, email and message.

join.title: Become part of HostMasters
join.subtitle: We are building a platform, not just a management company. Join us as a Manager or as Crew.

manager.title: Launch your management business
manager.tagline: You have the local network and speak the languages of international owners. We give you the system.
manager.point1: 15% of client subscriptions + 3% of gross rental
manager.point2: Portfolio bonuses: €150 at 10 props, €400 at 20, €750 at 30
manager.point4: Full platform: CRM, billing, operations handled for you
manager.headline: Manage properties on the Costa Tropical.
manager.description: You bring the owners — we handle operations, cleaning, maintenance, compliance, and AI pricing. No licence needed. Exclusive territory. Start earning in week one.
manager.expatDesc: You already speak the language of property owners in your zone — English, German, Dutch, Swedish. That's your edge. No real-estate licence required.
manager.territoryDesc: One Manager per zone — Almuñécar, Nerja, Salobreña, La Herradura. No competition from other Managers in your area.
manager.riskDesc: You don't clean, maintain, or handle guest comms. The HM Crew does that. You close deals and nurture relationships.
manager.simulatorSub: Based on Mid plan (€159/mo) + avg. €1,800 gross rental/property
manager.platformTitle: You close. The platform does the rest.
manager.referralDesc: Share your unique URL. Every owner who registers is automatically assigned to you.
manager.crmDesc: Track leads from first contact to signed contract. Never lose a prospect.
manager.crewOpsDesc: Cleaning, check-in/out, maintenance, inspections — all done by our on-demand team.
manager.aiDesc: Dynamic pricing for each property. Your clients earn more — and so do you.
manager.ctaDesc: 6-month minimum contract. Exclusive territory. Commission from day one. No upfront cost.

crew.title: Stable work on the Costa Tropical
crew.tagline: Professional short-term rental work with guaranteed payment and clear tasks.
crew.point1: Payment within 24 hours via the platform
crew.point2: Clear task list in the app — no confusion
crew.ctaDesc: Join our field operations team. Cleaning, maintenance, check-in/out, inspections. Paid within 24h per job.

form.thanksDesc: Thank you! We will review your application and contact you soon.

beta.heroTitle1: Be among the first to experience
beta.heroSubtitle: We're selecting 10 founding clients on the Costa Tropical. Lock in exclusive conditions for 24 months.
beta.benefit1: First month free on any plan
beta.benefit3: Direct WhatsApp access to the founder
beta.partnerCodePlaceholder: If you have a referral code
beta.thankYouDesc: We'll contact you within 24 hours to discuss next steps.
beta.required: Please fill in name, email and phone.
beta.whatYouGetTitle: What you get as a Founding Client
beta.card1Desc: Real-time dashboard with every euro tracked. Monthly statements, tax-ready reports, and zero hidden fees. You see exactly what your property earns.
beta.card2Desc: Our algorithm analyses seasonality, local events and competitor rates to maximise your revenue every single night. Up to +25% vs. fixed pricing.
beta.card3Desc: A certified on-the-ground crew handles cleaning, maintenance, check-ins and inspections. Quality guaranteed by checklists and photo verification.
beta.footerContact: Questions? Contact hello@hostmasters.es or WhatsApp +34 XXX XXX XXX

tax.title: Tax & Compliance
tax.subtitle: Stay on top of every fiscal obligation for your property in Spain.
tax.subtitleFull: Your Spanish fiscal obligations at a glance.
tax.descVut: Mandatory license from Junta de Andalucía to operate short-term rentals
tax.descModelo179: Quarterly declaration of guests to Spanish Tax Agency — €20 fine per guest not reported
tax.descIrnr: 19% income tax on rental earnings (24% for non-EU residents), filed quarterly
tax.descNie: Required for all non-resident owners — foundation of your Spanish fiscal identity
tax.descEnergyCert: Mandatory for all rentals, valid for 10 years (up to €6,000 fine without it)
tax.descFiscalRep: Mandatory for non-EU residents — receives official notifications
tax.descIbi: Annual property tax from the local city council
tax.riskDesc: Real fines from the Junta de Andalucía and Agencia Tributaria for short-term rental owners in 2025.
tax.fineNoVutDetail: Operating without registered tourist licence (Decreto 28/2016, Junta de Andalucía)
tax.fineNoNruDetail: Mandatory since 1 Jul 2025 — Airbnb / Booking de-list properties without it
tax.fineModelo179Detail: Quarterly guest report. A property with 80 guests/year = €1,600+ in penalties
tax.fineNoCertDetail: Mandatory for any rental — fine on top of being unable to advertise legally
tax.fineIrnrDetail: Non-resident income tax (Modelo 210) — penalties stack quarterly + interest
tax.fineNoFiscalRepDetail: Mandatory for UK / Norwegian / Swiss owners — Spanish state must reach you
tax.unlockDesc: Stop carrying the risk yourself. Track VUT, NRU, Modelo 179, IRNR, NIE and energy certificate in one place — with deadline alerts months before fines hit.
tax.featMidDeadline: Deadline tracking for every Spanish fiscal obligation
tax.featMidVault: Document vault for licences and certificates
tax.featMidAlerts: Automatic alerts 60 / 30 / 7 days before each deadline
tax.featPremiumFiled: Full service — Modelo 179 + IRNR filed by our certified tax advisor
tax.featPremiumFiscalRep: Fiscal representative service for non-EU residents
tax.planPrices: Mid €159/mo · Premium €269/mo — both are tax-deductible against your rental income.
tax.contactManagerResolve: Contact your manager to resolve pending items before they expire.
tax.noObligations: No obligations tracked yet. Your manager will set these up for you.
tax.premiumServiceDesc: Your Modelo 179, IRNR and fiscal representative are handled by our team in coordination with a certified Spanish tax advisor. If you need anything, message your manager directly.
tax.wantUsFiled: Want us to file for you?
tax.wantUsFiledDesc: Upgrade to Premium — we handle Modelo 179 and IRNR with a certified Spanish tax advisor.

intelligence.title: Market Intelligence
intelligence.subtitle: Costa Tropical short-term rental market data. Updated weekly.
intelligence.monitoring: HostMasters is monitoring the market for you
intelligence.monitoringDesc: Your property data contributes to our dataset. The more properties we manage, the more accurate our pricing and occupancy predictions become.
intelligence.dataCollectionDesc: We are building the Costa Tropical dataset. Market intelligence will appear here as data becomes available.
intelligence.phase1Desc: Weekly market scraping. Average prices, occupancy rates, and competitor analysis.
intelligence.phase2Desc: AI-powered pricing recommendations based on seasonality, events, and your property data.
intelligence.phase3Desc: Automated dynamic pricing. The system adjusts your nightly rate in real-time.

aiPage.title: AI Pricing Intelligence
aiPage.lockedDesc: Available on Mid and Premium plans. The system analyses competitor pricing on platforms and suggests the most competitive rates to maximise your revenue on the Costa Tropical.
aiPage.feat2: Suggestions by day of week and seasonality
aiPage.subtitle: Price analysis for your properties
aiPage.collectingDesc: Data is collected with each booking. Analyses will be available soon.
aiPage.competitorDesc: The HostMasters team is activating market data integration (PriceLabs) for your plan. You will receive a notification once it is available.
aiPage.competitorEta: Forecast: Q2 2026 · Your historical data is already being collected
